simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_sinh_as_div] using
    (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0)

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] (0:ℝ)) := by
    simpa [tendsto_principal] using (tendsto_one_div_atTop_nhds_0)
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp hk
  have hrewrite :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) =
        fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k) := by
    funext k
    by_cases hk0 : k = 0
    · simp [hk0]
    · have : (r / k) = r * (1 / k) := by
        field_simp [hk0, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
      simp [mul_sinh_as_div, this, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
  simpa [hrewrite] using hcomp

have h0 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝 0) :=
    tendsto_one_div_atTop_nhds_0_nat
  have h0' : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) :=
    (h0.mono_left (by
      intro s hs
      simpa [Filter.eventually_map] using hs))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) / ((1 : ℝ) / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp h0'
  have hEq : (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) / ((1 : ℝ) / k)) =
      fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k) := by
    funext k
    have : r * ((1 : ℝ) / k) = r / k := by ring_nf
    simp [this, mul_sinh_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
  simpa [hEq] using hcomp

simpa [mul_sinh_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
      (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0.comp (tendsto_id : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k) atTop atTop))

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhdsWithin_0 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
    exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp hk
  have hrewrite :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) =
        (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) := by
    funext k
    have : k * Real.sinh (r / k) = Real.sinh (r / k) / (1 / k) := mul_sinh_as_div r k
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, one_div] using this
  simpa [hrewrite]
    using hcomp

have hk0 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k : ℝ)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝 0))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp hk0
  have hEq :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) =
        fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k) := by
    funext k
    have : k * Real.sinh (r / k) = Real.sinh (r / k) / (1 / k) := mul_sinh_as_div r k
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, one_div, (by
      ring_nf : r / k = r * (1 / k))] using this
  simpa [hEq] using hcomp

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0_nat : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
    simpa [Filter.Tendsto] using (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp hk
  have hrewrite :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) =
        (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) := by
    funext k
    have : k * Real.sinh (r / k) = Real.sinh (r / k) / (1 / k) := mul_sinh_as_div r k
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, one_div, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, r / k, r * (1 / k)] using this
  simpa [hrewrite] using hcomp

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k : ℝ)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhdsWithin_neq (α := ℝ))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp hk
  simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, one_div, mul_sinh_as_div, mul_comm, mul_left_comm] using hcomp
